name: Pudding & Pie Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl and mix well.
2. Transfer the mixture to a large, airtight container.
3. Label the container as "Pudding & Pie Mix."
4. Store the mix in a cool, dry place.
5. Use within 6 to 8 months.
Makes about 9 cups of mix.
VARIATION: If you prefer cornstarch-based pudding and pie mixes, substitute 2 cups cornstarch for flour.
